use_cases: Displaying collapsible FAQ sections for product documentation or help centers
Organizing extended bio or service information on portfolio and personal websites
Creating expandable content sections for feature explanations in landing pages
Building multi-panel information displays with toggle-based content reveal
Structuring detailed content hierarchies without page reloads
ai_summary: A minimalist accordion component with expandable panels featuring Plus/Minus toggle icons. Uses a clean layout with grid-based content areas for displaying detailed information like bios, services, or feature descriptions. Designed for responsive use across devices with collapsible sections ideal for FAQ pages, portfolio sites, or content-heavy landing pages.
